# Q9 windowcomp first value + dedup + sort (lateral movement rdp)

**Dataset**: `gx_06_rdp` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

RDP lateral-movement hunting — remote-desktop connection patterns across hosts. Q9 windowcomp first value + dedup + sort.

```sql
dataset = gx_06_rdp | alter et = to_epoch(ts) | windowcomp first_value(dst_host) by user sort asc et as entry_host | dedup user by asc et | fields user, entry_host | sort asc user
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 5). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
